svg.title: PR Review Bot — end-to-end data flow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how a GitHub PR event flows through webhook verification, diff fetching, LLM review, and posting back to GitHub.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What GitHub events trigger the PR review bot?')
sendPrompt('How does HMAC-SHA256 webhook signature verification work?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement idempotency for webhook events?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub API return PR diffs?')
sendPrompt('How do I truncate large PR diffs before sending to an LLM?')
sendPrompt('What does a good code review system prompt look like?')
sendPrompt('How does structured JSON output work with the Claude API?')
sendPrompt('How do I validate LLM JSON output with Pydantic?')
sendPrompt('How do I post inline review comments to a GitHub PR via the API?')
sendPrompt('What does the final PR review comment look like from the bot?')
